title: Call for OceanGliders Steering Team
description: The OceanGliders Steering Team (OGST) provides scientific leadership for OceanGliders and liaises with other parts of GOOS. The call for applications is now open — new appointments will take effect in Fall 2026.
diversity: OceanGliders encourages applications from researchers in South and East Asia, Africa, and South America, early career scientists (within 10 years of their most recent degree), and candidates who can help expand the representativeness and diversity of the Steering Team.

title: Call for Task Teams
description:
OceanGliders Task Teams drive focused activity on specific scientific and technical topics — from climate and carbon to ocean health, circulation, events, and prediction — connecting glider operators, scientists, manufacturers, and stakeholders across the international community.

Proposals for new Task Teams and reports from existing ones are welcome.

newTeams.label: New Task Teams
newTeams.instruction: Submit a short abstract (1–2 pages) to

existingTeams.label: Existing Task Teams
existingTeams.instruction: Submit your annual report and membership update by the deadline above.
